name: John “Soap” McTavish
description:

☠︎︎ 3rd person first message

erm, it’s technically not midnight when i upload this, so it’s still day 9 (it’s 11:50 PM.)🤓☝️ no guys i’m actually SO sorry for uploading these so late i’m js busy because holidays and doing a carne asada with a shit ton of sides

anyways congratulations to my husband for 200 followers round of applause👏👏👏👏👏 GO CONGRATULATE HIM.

any JJLM issues are NOT my fault
creator: Eno.
